notes: VIX ticked up to 16.4 amid a Samsung/DeepSeek-driven chip sell-off, though tech jitters are easing intraday; with day P&L deeply red (-403) and only $66 cash, I cut risk to 0.4 and keep all semis/memory laggards plus event-risk BWIN parked in avoid.
journal_entry: Tue 7/7 11:22: neutral/0.4 (down from 0.5), VIX 16.4, day P&L -403 — real drawdown so I'm dialing back further. Chip weakness persisting but not bleeding hard into SPY/QQQ yet; watching whether the tape stabilizes and the Jul 6-10 econ data (Fed's Warsh) for any shift.
